rationale: Plan v11 is implementation-ready as an executable, ordered task sequence (0–7) with frozen interfaces, normative tables, per-task exits, and mechanical proofs that directly discharge the objective: build advisory zero-dep clotho/ and prove it by weaving TELOS, with deriveExecutableRef answered from a verified ledger against the hand-audited eight-source set. Decisions D1–D33, global constraints, and the data model are mutually consistent and align with the stated trust model (fail-closed, closed registries/inventories, spine read-only, Clotho advisory-only with bidirectional structural proofs). Sequencing correctly isolates the CI matrix (Task 0 after scaffold), defers inventory naming until files exist (D17), splits ledger structural integrity from inventory/closure equality (D19), and places full driver accounting/publication (D20/D21/D26/D28/D29/D33) only after substrate and weavers exist. No plan-internal contradiction, missing exit criterion, or trust-model violation requires a blocking condition or pre-approval edit; residual limitations are already bounded under Accepted risks and do not prevent AS-IS execution against governing design v2.8.
